title: Firing chamber
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Firing chamber''' was the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] component where the [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] energy was activated and intensified in the microseconds before the weapon was fired.

Larger firing chambers allowed for wider energy beams that caused greater damage, so they were highly sought after in the customization of blaster weaponry. For example, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] produced large chambers that could triple the damage dealt by even the smallest weapons, turning even the humblest of blasters into deadly weapons capable of blasting huge chunks out of anything it hit.

==Types of firing chambers==
*[[Mandalorian chamber/Legends|Mandalorian chamber]]
*[[Beam splitter/Legends|Beam splitter]]
*[[Broadened chamber]]
*[[Amplifying chamber/Legends|Amplifying chamber]]
*[[Precision chamber]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
